title: Software Engineer 2
description:
**Software Engineer II – P2 (WorksManager) – Full Stack**
 We are looking for a
 **full stack engineer** 
 with
 **3 to 6 years** 
 of experience to build web applications. You will create applications from scratch, enhance existing systems, and provide user support.
   

  

**Job Summary**
 As a Software Engineer II on the
 **Trimble WorksManager**

 **Civil Construction Field Systems (CCFS)** 
 division at
 **Trimble, Chennai** 
 , where we use solid engineering practices, agile delivery, and modern design and architecture on contemporary platforms. If this sounds like a fit, read on.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
 Participate in the full product lifecycle: analysis, architecture, design, coding, unit/integration testing, and system testing.
   

  

* Provide sustaining support and end\\-to\\-end feature work across UI and services for the WorksManager product.
* As part of an agile team, plan and execute work items; act as Scrum Master when needed.
* Design, develop, and maintain solutions from high\\-level product descriptions or requirements.
* Produce module\\-level designs that are reusable and maintainable; follow design patterns and SOLID principles where applicable.
* Document designs, code, and tests; produce test reports as needed.
* Participate in peer reviews and give constructive feedback.
* Be fully accountable for your work; estimate, plan, and manage time; meet deadlines for modules, documentation, and releases.
* Execute assignments with little to moderate supervision; present work to the team when required.
* Stay current with technology and market trends.


**Skills \\& Experience Required**
**Backend \\& architecture**
* Hands\\-on Java 8 and Java 17\\+.
* Solid Spring ecosystem, especially Spring Boot.
* Good grasp of architecture patterns, algorithms, and software engineering fundamentals.
* Domain\\-Driven Design and microservices\\-oriented design.
* MongoDB and MySQL.


**Cloud, platform \\& delivery**
* Azure and AWS; comfortable on Linux.
* Cloud deployments and scripting.
* BDD/TDD; CI tooling and practices.
* Docker and Kubernetes for pipelines and operations is a plus.


**Frontend**
* Hands\\-on experience building UIs with React (components, hooks, and common patterns).
* Strong HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript is needed with knowledge in responsive design.
* Experience in other frameworks/libraries is an added advantage.
* Experience improving web application performance and UX\\-related technical quality.
* SCSS/LESS/JSS preferred.
* State management (e.g. Redux/MobX or React\\-centric approaches such as Context API where appropriate).
* NPM/Yarn, bundlers such as webpack (or equivalent).
* Unit testing with Jest (and Karma where applicable to the stack).


**Engineering productivity \\& tooling**
* Effective use of IDE and workflow tooling for navigation, refactoring, debugging, and profiling.
* Familiarity with AI\\-assisted development tools (e.g. Cursor, GitHub Copilot, or similar) to move faster with good judgment—validate suggestions, keep code review–ready quality, and follow security, licensing, and company policy.
* Comfort with common collaboration and productivity tools used in distributed teams (e.g. documentation, chat, screen share, and wiki or knowledge bases).


**General**
* Hands\\-on developer (most of the time in code).
* Strong OOP, design patterns, analysis, and problem\\-solving.
* Keen to learn; contributes through code reviews.
* Familiar with the usual lifecycle stack: build, unit tests, version control, work/defect tracking, Agile.
* Strong communication and collaboration; upbeat, motivated, self\\-directed.
* Ability to mentor new graduates and newer team members.


**Education**
* BE/BTech/ME/MTech/M.S. in Computer Science or equivalent.


**About Trimble**
 Dedicated to the world’s tomorrow, Trimble is a technology company delivering solutions that enable our customers to work in new ways to measure, build, grow and move goods for a better quality of life. Core technologies in positioning, modeling, connectivity and data analytics connect the digital and physical worlds to improve productivity, quality, safety, transparency and sustainability. From purpose\\-built products and enterprise lifecycle solutions to industry cloud services, Trimble is transforming critical industries such as construction, geospatial, agriculture and transportation to power an interconnected world of work. For more information about Trimble (NASDAQ: TRMB), visit: www.trimble.com
   

  

**Location**
 Chennai. Under full\\-time in\\-office work arrangement, this resource primarily supports the Field Systems Segment and works collaboratively across the CCFS Cloud Software teams.
   

  

**About Our CCFS Cloud Software Division**
 We work on cloud solutions which help connect office and field for Civil Construction Softwares.
   

  

**Trimble’s Inclusiveness Commitment**
 We believe in celebrating our differences. That is why our diversity is our strength. To us, that means actively participating in opportunities to be inclusive. Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion have guided our current success while also moving our desire to improve. We actively seek to add members to our community who represent our customers and the places we live and work.
   

  

 We have programs in place to make sure our people are seen, heard, and welcomed and most importantly that they know they belong, no matter who they are or where they are coming from.
   

  

****How to Apply:****
 Please submit an online application for this position by clicking on the ‘Apply Now’ button located in this posting.
   

  

**Join a Values\\-Driven Team: Belong, Grow, Innovate.**
 At Trimble, our core values of Belong, Grow, and Innovate aren't just words—they're the foundation of our culture. We foster an environment where you are seen, heard, and valued (Belong); where you have an opportunity to build a career and drive our collective growth (Grow); and where your innovative ideas shape the future (Innovate). We believe in empowering local teams to create impactful strategies, ensuring our global vision resonates with every individual. Become part of a team where your contributions truly matter.

title: Network Software Engineer
description:
**Job Overview**
 Plan A Technologies is looking for a
 **Network Software Engineer** 
 to design, build, and maintain software that integrates network platforms, IT systems, and data stores. This role owns end\\-to\\-end integrations—including APIs, events, and ETL—to ensure reliable data flow and deliver performant, secure services across cloud and on\\-prem environments.
   

  

 You will deploy services using AWS compute and maintain integrations with tools like Jira, ServiceNow, Kafka, and GitHub. This position requires operating and optimizing Postgres SQL/MySQL and focusing on high\\-throughput reads/writes. You will lead technical conversations, gather requirements, and translate operational workflows into scalable integrations while collaborating across NetOps, Cloud, Security, and Data Engineering teams.
   

  

**Please note:** 
 you must have at least 5\\+ years of experience as a Network Software Engineer to be considered for this role.
   

  

**JOB RESPONSIBILITY \\& EXPERIENCE:**
* Design, build, and maintain software that integrates network platforms, IT systems, and data stores.
* Own end‑to‑end integrations (APIs, events, ETL), ensure reliable data flow, and deliver performant, secure services across cloud/on‑prem environments.
* Strong experience designing and deploying services using AWS compute, IAM, Lambda, API Gateway, Step Functions, S3, RDS, VPC, etc.
* Build/maintain integrations with: Jira, ITSM (ServiceNow/Jira Service Management), messaging (Kafka/RabbitMQ)observability (Prometheus/Grafana, ELK/EFK), CMDB/asset (ServiceNow CMDB), source control/CI (GitHub)
* Design/consume REST and RPC APIs; author OpenAPI/Swagger
* Strong SQL and data modeling, query tuning with execution plans and indexes.
* Operate and optimize Postgres SQL/MySQL
* Focus on high‑throughput reads/writes, and time‑series databases
* Practical understanding of TCP/IP, DNS, HTTP(S), TLS, load balancers, proxies, and service discovery
* Proficiency in C\\# / JS, React/typescript. Python (nice to have)
* Ability to leverage Co\\-Pilot and guide agentic AI
* Microservices, containers, and orchestration (Docker, Kubernetes)
* Robust testing (unit/integration/contract/e2e) and rollback strategies
* Strong communicator who can lead technical conversations, gather requirements, and translate operational workflows into scalable integrations.
* Collaborates across NetOps, Cloud, Security, and Data Engineering teams.
* Excellent verbal and written English communication skills
* Excellent organizational, problem solver, and analytical abilities
* Outstanding communication, and interpersonal skills
* Initiative and drive to do great things


**About The Company/Benefits**
 Plan A Technologies is an American software development and technology advisory firm that brings top\\-tier engineering talent to clients around the world. Our software engineers tackle custom product development projects, staff augmentation, major integrations and upgrades, and much more. The team is far more hands\\-on than the giant outsourcing shops, but still big enough to handle major enterprise clients.
   

  

**Read more about us here:** 
 www.PlanAtechnologies.com .
   

  

**Location:** 
 Work From Home 100% of the time, or come in to one of our global offices. Up to you.
   

  

**Great colleagues and an upbeat work environment:** 
 You'll join an excellent team of supportive engineers and project managers who work hard but don't ever compete with each other.
   

  

**Benefits:** 
 Vacation, Brand New Laptop, and More: You’ll get a generous vacation schedule, and other goodies.
   

  

***If this sounds like you, we'd love to hear from you!***

**Why join us**
 We are committed to creating a diverse environment and are proud to be an equal opportunity employer. All qualified applicants receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, national origin, genetics, disability, age, or veteran status.

Whether you’re joining us for a period of months, years or your entire career, together we can have a positive impact on the future. Creating, daring, innovating, and taking action are part of our DNA. If you too want to be directly involved, grow in a stimulating and caring environment, feel useful on a daily basis and develop or strengthen your expertise, you will feel right at home with us!
   

  

 Still hesitating?

 We are committed to creating a diverse environment and are proud to be an equal opportunity employer. All qualified applicants receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, national origin, genetics, disability, age, or veteran status”
   

  

**Business insight**
 At Societe Generale, we are convinced that people are drivers of change, and that the world of tomorrow will be shaped by all their initiatives, from the smallest to the most ambitious.
   

  

 Whether you’re joining us for a period of months, years or your entire career, together we can have a positive impact on the future. Creating, daring, innovating and taking action are part of our DNA.

 Still hesitating?

title: FDE - Developer
description:
JD for Forward Deployed Engineer \\- Developer
   

  

**About Kore.ai**
 Kore.ai accelerates business outcomes from AI by providing enterprises with agentic AI applications built on the industry\\-leading agent platform. Kore.ai’s Agent Platform is recognized by industry analysts as a leading agent platform. Through the platform, clients can create agentic AI application projects to support customer service, employee productivity, and process automation. Recognized as a leader by Gartner, Forrester, and IDC, Kore.ai serves over 400 Global 2000 companies — including Fortune 500 leaders across banking, insurance, healthcare, telecom, and retail.
   

  

****The Role****
 We are looking for a
 ****Forward Deployed Engineer / Developer****
 who combines strong hands\\-on engineering skills with the ability to engage directly with enterprise customers. You will be embedded with Fortune 500 technical teams, writing code to solve their hardest problems, building integrations, and participating in customer\\-facing technical conversations that turn complex requirements into real solutions.
   

  

 You bring deep technical expertise alongside a genuine ability to empathise with customers, understand their business challenges, and apply AI to solve problems that improve how they operate. You are as comfortable building a working integration as you are explaining it to a customer's engineering team and adapting quickly based on their feedback.
   

  

 Based out of our
 ****Hyderabad****
 offices, you will collaborate with implementation teams across the US and remote geographies, coordinating across time zones to support successful enterprise deployments end\\-to\\-end.
   

  

**What You Will Do**
* Solve Hard Problems at Scale: Work directly with enterprise customers to understand their most complex technical challenges, integration bottlenecks, scaling constraints, multi\\-system orchestration, and architect solutions from the ground up.
* Hands\\-On Integration and Engineering: Build integrations connecting the Kore.ai platform to enterprise systems such as CRMs, ERPs, contact centers, and communication tools. Own your code end\\-to\\-end, from prototype through production, optimizing for performance, reliability, and scale.
* Customer Technical Engagement: Participate in customer\\-facing technical sessions, requirements workshops, and integration reviews alongside Technical Leads. Understand the customer's business problem first, then build the right solution for it.
* Proof\\-of\\-Concept Development: Rapidly build working PoCs and demos that demonstrate how AI can solve a specific customer challenge. Translate a vague requirement into a working system that the customer can see and react to.
* Debug and Improve: Own production issues end\\-to\\-end, diagnose root causes, resolve integration failures, and continuously improve the performance and reliability of deployed solutions.
* Scale What Works: Document what you build, create reusable components and integration patterns, and contribute to a growing library of technical assets that help the broader team move faster.
* Feed Product Insights: Surface recurring customer integration challenges and platform gaps with clear, well\\-documented observations from the field that help shape the product roadmap.


**What We Are Looking For**
****Must Have****
* 2\\-6 years of hands\\-on engineering experience in enterprise software, platform engineering, or solutions engineering, with a proven track record of solving complex customer problems through hands\\-on technical delivery.
* Hands\\-on experience with Generative AI and LLM\\-based development, including RAG implementations, prompt engineering, and agentic AI applications. Familiarity with multi\\-agent orchestration frameworks such as LangChain, LangGraph, AutoGen, CrewAI, or the Kore.ai Agent Platform.
* Familiarity with LLM guardrails, evaluation frameworks, and responsible AI controls, implementing safety, content filtering, and output validation in enterprise deployments. Exposure to MCP servers and tool\\-use patterns for connecting LLMs to external data sources and APIs.
* Hands\\-on technical proficiency across APIs, microservices, cloud infrastructure (AWS/Azure/GCP), distributed systems, enterprise integration patterns, and complex system integrations connecting enterprise platforms, contact centers, CRMs, ERPs, and communication systems at scale.
* Experience working with enterprise customers, communicating technical concepts clearly to engineering teams and stakeholders, and building credibility through delivery. Ability to understand a customer's business problem, ask the right questions, and translate requirements into working solutions.


****Strong Plus****
* Expertise in Voice AI, IVR modernization, STT/TTS pipelines, or enterprise telephony integrations (SIP/WebRTC).
* Prior experience in a solutions engineering, professional services, or field engineering role at an enterprise software company.
* Familiarity with the Kore.ai platform or similar conversational/agentic AI platforms.


**Who You Are**
* Relentlessly curious. You dig deeper when others stop, ask "why" five times, and genuinely enjoy understanding how complex systems work.
* A pragmatic engineer. You know when to build the elegant solution and when to build the one that works now. You balance technical excellence with business urgency.
* A trusted advisor. Customer engineering teams see you as a peer, not a vendor. You earn credibility through depth of delivery, not slides.
* Comfortable in ambiguity. You thrive when there's no playbook, when the requirements are unclear, and when the path forward needs to be invented.
* An owner. You take responsibility end\\-to\\-end, from initial discovery through production deployment. You don't hand off problems; you solve them.
* A force multiplier. You make the teams around you better, customers, partners, and internal engineering alike.


****Education****
* Bachelor’s degree in Engineering, Computer Science, or related technical field.
* Master’s degree or equivalent depth of expertise preferred but not required — we value demonstrated capability over credentials.


****Why Kore.ai****
 You won’t just be supporting deployments — you’ll be defining how the world’s largest organizations adopt agentic AI. Your work will directly shape how Fortune 500 enterprises architect, build, and scale their AI capabilities. You’ll be at the intersection of cutting\\-edge AI technology and real\\-world enterprise transformation, with the autonomy to solve problems that matter and the impact to see your solutions running at scale. Join us in building not just better AI, but the enterprise infrastructure for the agentic AI era.
   

  

 Kore.ai is an Equal Opportunity Employer committed to diversity in the workplace.
   

  

 Qualified applicants from all backgrounds are encouraged to apply.
